commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b3f3618931f0173d56531e2f51e6444c6fc2640e)
commands.review_summary:
Adds WhatsApp `replyToOfflineMessages` and `offlineMessageMaxAgeSeconds` config, wires it through account resolution and append-upsert handling, and updates tests, generated config metadata, docs, and changelog.

PR surface: Source +157, Tests +5, Docs +21, Generated +16. Total +199 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main skips `append` messages older than the 60-second connect grace via `shouldSkipStaleAppend`, and existing tests assert that stale append behavior. I did not establish live WhatsApp outage proof in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are conflict resolution against current durable inbound architecture, maintainer choice of replay policy, and contributor after-fix WhatsApp proof.

target.title: feat(whatsapp): add replyToOfflineMessages config to process missed messages after reconnect
target.body:
## Problem

Messages received during WhatsApp disconnects are **silently lost**. When the gateway reconnects, offline messages arrive with `upsert.type === "append"` (history sync) and are **skipped** by default.

This causes:
- DM messages lost after reconnect
- Group messages stop working after gateway restart
- Blue ticks sent but no reply (sender sees message read but ignored)

**15+ issues** trace back to the same `append` skip.

## Solution

Add opt-in config to process offline messages:

```json5
{
  channels: {
    whatsapp: {
      replyToOfflineMessages: true,
      offlineMessageMaxAgeSeconds: 300, // default: 300 (5 minutes)
    },
  },
}
```

- `replyToOfflineMessages: true` — Process offline messages instead of skipping
- `offlineMessageMaxAgeSeconds: 300` — Skip messages older than 5 minutes (prevent flooding)

## Related Issues

- **#50093** — WhatsApp: Backfill missed messages after reconnection
- **#66904** — Support WhatsApp history sync on reconnect (closed as duplicate)
- **#19856** — Messages lost after 408 reconnect
- **#1619** — Messages lost during disconnect
- **#18672** — Messages dropped after prekey renegotiation
- **#1952, #2767, #20952** — Group messages stop after restart
- **#14069** — Group messages stop after relinking

## Based On

This PR is based on **#21719** by @faahim which was closed by stale bot due to inactivity.

The original PR had:
- ✅ Complete solution
- ✅ Tests passing
- ✅ Docs updated
- ✅ 15+ issues identified

## Changes

1. `src/config/types.whatsapp.ts` — Add config fields
2. `extensions/whatsapp/src/accounts.ts` — Add resolved fields
3. `extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/monitor.ts` — Implement logic
4. `extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor.ts` — Pass options

## Default Behavior

**Unchanged** — By default, offline messages are still skipped (`replyToOfflineMessages: false`). Users must opt-in to process them.

---

**Context:** OpenClaw WhatsApp bundled user since 2026.3.13, currently on latest version.
target.author: rafaelmariano-glitch
